Priority of for the big popup with snooze and dismiss buttons is too low to unlock the screen! \n\nIt happens if you have disabled and enabled notifications again or changed settings manually. \n\nClick OK to jump to system settings and select the highest priority for this notification (Make sound and pop up on screen). \n\nIronically, you should set the sound to none in advanced settings. Oh no! Big problem! All notifications are turned off, including the big popup with snooze and dismiss buttons! \n\nClick OK to jump to settings and enable the notifications! To display a popup when the alarm rings, permission to show notifications is required.
